docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEMPLE, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMBRINO, SCOTT AN IND DBA DAV EL TRANSPORTATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
